symbols.name: IJobSchedulerService
symbols.summary: Defines the core runtime dispatch and control surface for jobs.

syntax.content: public interface IJobSchedulerService

symbols.name: DispatchAsync(object, JobDispatchOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Dispatches the specified job type using its configured manual trigger.

syntax.content: Task> DispatchAsync(object data = null, JobDispatchOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) where TJob : class, IJob

symbols.name: DispatchAsync(string, object, JobDispatchOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Dispatches the specified job name using its configured manual trigger.

syntax.content: Task> DispatchAsync(string jobName, object data = null, JobDispatchOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: DispatchAndWaitAsync(object, JobDispatchOptions, TimeSpan?, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Dispatches the specified job type and waits until the inline execution reaches a terminal state.

syntax.content: Task> DispatchAndWaitAsync(object data = null, JobDispatchOptions options = null, TimeSpan? timeout = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) where TJob : class, IJob

symbols.name: DispatchAndWaitAsync(string, object, JobDispatchOptions, TimeSpan?, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Dispatches the specified job name and waits until the inline execution reaches a terminal state.

syntax.content: Task> DispatchAndWaitAsync(string jobName, object data = null, JobDispatchOptions options = null, TimeSpan? timeout = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: CancelOccurrenceAsync(Guid, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Requests cancellation of an occurrence.

syntax.content: Task CancelOccurrenceAsync(Guid occurrenceId, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: InterruptOccurrenceAsync(Guid, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Requests interruption of a running occurrence.

syntax.content: Task InterruptOccurrenceAsync(Guid occurrenceId, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: EnableJobAsync(string, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Enables a registered job through durable runtime state.

syntax.content: Task EnableJobAsync(string jobName, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: DisableJobAsync(string, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Disables a registered job through durable runtime state.

syntax.content: Task DisableJobAsync(string jobName, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: PauseJobAsync(string, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Pauses a registered job without mutating its code-first definition.

syntax.content: Task PauseJobAsync(string jobName, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: ResumeJobAsync(string, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Resumes a previously paused registered job.

syntax.content: Task ResumeJobAsync(string jobName, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: PauseTriggerAsync(string, string, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Pauses a registered trigger without mutating its code-first definition.

syntax.content: Task PauseTriggerAsync(string jobName, string triggerName, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: ResumeTriggerAsync(string, string, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Resumes a previously paused registered trigger.

syntax.content: Task ResumeTriggerAsync(string jobName, string triggerName, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: EnableTriggerAsync(string, string, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Enables a registered trigger through durable runtime state.

syntax.content: Task EnableTriggerAsync(string jobName, string triggerName, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: DisableTriggerAsync(string, string, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Disables a registered trigger through durable runtime state.

syntax.content: Task DisableTriggerAsync(string jobName, string triggerName, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: PauseOccurrenceAsync(Guid, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Pauses an eligible occurrence before a new attempt starts.

syntax.content: Task PauseOccurrenceAsync(Guid occurrenceId, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: ResumeOccurrenceAsync(Guid, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Resumes a previously paused occurrence.

syntax.content: Task ResumeOccurrenceAsync(Guid occurrenceId, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: RetryOccurrenceAsync(Guid, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Requests retry of an eligible failed occurrence.

syntax.content: Task RetryOccurrenceAsync(Guid occurrenceId, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: ArchiveOccurrenceAsync(Guid, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Archives an occurrence.

syntax.content: Task ArchiveOccurrenceAsync(Guid occurrenceId, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: ReleaseOccurrenceLeaseAsync(Guid, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Releases the persisted lease for an occurrence so it can be recovered.

syntax.content: Task ReleaseOccurrenceLeaseAsync(Guid occurrenceId, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: RetryOccurrencesAsync(IReadOnlyCollection, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Retries the selected eligible failed occurrences.

syntax.content: Task> RetryOccurrencesAsync(IReadOnlyCollection occurrenceIds, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: CancelOccurrencesAsync(IReadOnlyCollection, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Cancels the selected eligible occurrences.

syntax.content: Task> CancelOccurrencesAsync(IReadOnlyCollection occurrenceIds, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: ArchiveOccurrencesAsync(IReadOnlyCollection, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Archives the selected eligible occurrences.

syntax.content: Task> ArchiveOccurrencesAsync(IReadOnlyCollection occurrenceIds, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: CreateBatchAsync(JobBatchCreateRequest, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Creates an empty or pre-described batch record.

syntax.content: Task> CreateBatchAsync(JobBatchCreateRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: DispatchBatchAsync(JobBatchDispatchRequest, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Creates a batch and dispatches child occurrences as one accepted operation.

syntax.content: Task> DispatchBatchAsync(JobBatchDispatchRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: AttachToBatchAsync(string, JobBatchDispatchRequest, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Attaches additional child occurrences to an existing batch.

syntax.content: Task> AttachToBatchAsync(string batchId, JobBatchDispatchRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: RetryBatchAsync(string, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Retries eligible failed child occurrences for a batch.

syntax.content: Task> RetryBatchAsync(string batchId, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: CancelBatchAsync(string, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Cancels eligible child occurrences for a batch.

syntax.content: Task> CancelBatchAsync(string batchId, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: PauseBatchAsync(string, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Pauses eligible child occurrences for a batch.

syntax.content: Task PauseBatchAsync(string batchId, string reason = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: ResumeBatchAsync(string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Resumes eligible child occurrences for a batch.

syntax.content: Task ResumeBatchAsync(string batchId, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
